segments: قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) ائْتِ مَقَامَ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هُوَ تَحْتَ الْمِيزَابِ فَإِنَّهُ كَانَ مَقَامَهُ إِذَا اسْتَأْذَنَ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ قُلْ أَيْ جَوَادُ أَيْ كَرِيمُ أَيْ قَرِيبُ أَيْ بَعِيدُ أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ وَ أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَرُدَّ عَلَيَّ نِعْمَتَكَ
قَالَ وَ ذَلِكَ مَقَامٌ لَا تَدْعُو فِيهِ حَائِضٌ تَسْتَقْبِلُ الْقِبْلَةَ ثُمَّ تَدْعُو بِدُعَاءِ الدَّمِ إِلَّا رَأَتِ الطُّهْرَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.
arabic.text:
قَالَ أَبُو عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) ائْتِ مَقَامَ جَبْرَئِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) وَ هُوَ تَحْتَ الْمِيزَابِ فَإِنَّهُ كَانَ مَقَامَهُ إِذَا اسْتَأْذَنَ عَلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) وَ قُلْ أَيْ جَوَادُ أَيْ كَرِيمُ أَيْ قَرِيبُ أَيْ بَعِيدُ أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ وَ أَسْأَلُكَ أَنْ تَرُدَّ عَلَيَّ نِعْمَتَكَ

قَالَ وَ ذَلِكَ مَقَامٌ لَا تَدْعُو فِيهِ حَائِضٌ تَسْتَقْبِلُ الْقِبْلَةَ ثُمَّ تَدْعُو بِدُعَاءِ الدَّمِ إِلَّا رَأَتِ الطُّهْرَ إِنْ شَاءَ اللَّهُ.

segments: Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Muawiya Bin Ammar, altogether said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Go to the standing place of Jibraeel<sup>as</sup>, and it is beneath the water sprout, and it was his<sup>as</sup> standing place when he<sup>as</sup> sought permission to (visit) Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, and say, ‘O Benevolent! O Generous! O Near! O Remote! I ask You<sup>azwj</sup> to Send Blessings upon Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the Progeny<sup>asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household; and I ask You<sup>azwj</sup> to Return upon me Your<sup>azwj</sup> Bounties’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And that is a place wherein a menstruating woman would not supplicate facing the Qiblah, the supplication of the blood, except that she would see purity, if Allah<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Ibrahim, from his father, and Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazl Bin Shazaan, from Safwan Bin Yahya, from Muawiya Bin Ammar, altogether said,

‘Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Go to the standing place of Jibraeel<sup>as</sup>, and it is beneath the water sprout, and it was his<sup>as</sup> standing place when he<sup>as</sup> sought permission to (visit) Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>, and say, ‘O Benevolent! O Generous! O Near! O Remote! I ask You<sup>azwj</sup> to Send Blessings upon Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the Progeny<sup>asws</sup> of Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> and the People<sup>asws</sup> of his<sup>saww</sup> Household; and I ask You<sup>azwj</sup> to Return upon me Your<sup>azwj</sup> Bounties’.

He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And that is a place wherein a menstruating woman would not supplicate facing the Qiblah, the supplication of the blood, except that she would see purity, if Allah<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn Isma‘il from af-Fadf ibn Shadhan, from Safwan ibn Yahya from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Am mar all of them have said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You should go to the Station of Jibril, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and it is under al-Mizab. This place was his station wherefrom he asked permission from the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause. You should say at this place, ‘O generous, O Honorable, O the one who is very near, O the one who is far. I appeal before You to grant salawat (favors and compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause). I appeal before You to return to me Your bounty.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘This is a station where if a women experiencing menses, facing the direction of al-Ka‘bah, prays with the prayer for experiencing menses, she will see herself clean, if Allah so wills.’”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Ibrahim has narrated from his father and Muhammad ibn Isma‘il from af-Fadf ibn Shadhan, from Safwan ibn Yahya from Mu‘awiyah ibn ‘Am mar all of them have said the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘You should go to the Station of Jibril, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, and it is under al-Mizab. This place was his station wherefrom he asked permission from the Messenger of Allah, O Allah, grant compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause. You should say at this place, ‘O generous, O Honorable, O the one who is very near, O the one who is far. I appeal before You to grant salawat (favors and compensation to Muhammad and his family worthy of their services to Your cause). I appeal before You to return to me Your bounty.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘This is a station where if a women experiencing menses, facing the direction of al-Ka‘bah, prays with the prayer for experiencing menses, she will see herself clean, if Allah so wills.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/269)
gradings.label: موثق كالصحيح
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (18/269)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ إِبْرَاهِيمَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ وَ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ عَنِ الْفَضْلِ بْنِ شَاذَانَ عَنْ صَفْوَانَ بْنِ يَحْيَى عَنْ مُعَاوِيَةَ بْنِ عَمَّارٍ جَمِيعاً قَالَ
